あ、あの……本当に、タイツを持って帰るんですか……？: Ah, um... are you truly going to take those tights home...?
元々、お客様がお持ち込みになられたものですから、<br>それは構わないのですが…:
Well, since you, honored customer, brought them yourself, I do not
mind... b-but could you at least wait until I wash them...?
あぁ……イヤなんですか、そうですか……: Ah... you do not want me to? I see...
恥じらうシルヴィアに見送られながら、<br>客は満足そうにホクホクした表情で娼館:
Seen off by an embarrassed Sylvia, the customer left the brothel with
a beaming, satisfied expression.
本当にお持ち帰りになるなんて……: To think that gentleman actually took them home...
『２度と再現できない芸術作品だ』などとおっしゃっていましたが、<br>わたくしが:
He complimented it as 'an unrepeatable work of art,' but... I suppose
art is defined differently here than in my world.
それにしても……『太ももコキ』ですか……<br>そんな技があるなんて、まったく知:
Nevertheless... a 'thighjob,' is it? I had no idea such a technique
existed.
やはりこの遊戯……奥が深いですわね……: As I thought, this game... it is quite deep.
1人、変なところで感心するシルヴィアだった。: Sylvia, alone, found herself impressed by this bizarre detail.
